name: moegirl-yomitan
description: Build a Yomitan term dictionary from public Moegirlpedia (萌娘百科) lead summaries. Automated weekly builds via GitHub Actions.
features: CLI with configurable batch size and concurrency

name: userscripts
description: A shared collection of browser userscripts with direct install links and a repo manifest that feeds this site.
features: Installable .user.js scripts hosted from a dedicated repo
Repo-level manifest powers script listings on this website
Designed so new scripts appear here without extra site code changes
